name: Zuari Global Limited
summary: Zuari Global Limited engages in agriculture, heavy engineering, infrastructure, lifestyle, and services businesses in India. The company operates through seven segments: Engineering, Furniture, Real estate, Sugar, Power, Investment Service and Management Services segments. It offers technology, basic engineering, detailed engineering, project management, technical consultancy, contract management, procurement, and construction services to chemical, fertilizer, oil and gas, petrochemical, power, engineering, contracting, and other infrastructure projects; manufactures, sells, and trades in furniture products; develops real estate projects; and offers capital market related services. The company also manufactures and sells sugar and its by products; and generates power. In addition, it offers management services; commodity trading services; distributes financial products; and acts as an insurance broker to individuals and corporates. The company was formerly known as Zuari Industries Limited and changed its name to Zuari Global Limited in June 2012. Zuari Global Limited was incorporated in 1967 and is based in Sancoale, India.
